Publications

Preprints

  • Author, A., Your Name, Author, C. Title of the preprint. arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX.

Journal Articles

2026

  • Author, A., Your Name, Author, C. “Title of the paper.” Journal Name Volume, pages (2026).

2025

  • Your Name, Author, B. “Another paper title.” Another Journal Volume, pages (2025).

Conference Papers

  • Your Name. “Conference contribution title.” Conference Name (2025).
